scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.test: npm run test -w client && npm run test -w server
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w client && npm run lint -w server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w client && npm run lint:fix -w server
